title: Bloodsucka Jones vs. The Creeping Death
original_title: Bloodsucka Jones vs. The Creeping Death
overview: In this sequel, Bloodsucka Jones and his friends must battle zombies, weight gain, and tumbleweeds as they attempt to save the world from certain doom.
